Your diary date (if set) and watched status for this film remain publicly visible. Ratings on Close Friends and You entries don’t contribute to stats. Add members to your Close Friends from their profile. Set your account default for Privacy mode in Settings.

Draft entries don’t appear in your watched films or diary for others, and don’t contribute to your stats.

Where to watch

Trailer

  JustWatch

Incendies

2010

Directed by Denis Villeneuve

Synopsis

The search began at the opening of their mother's will.

A mother's last wishes send twins Jeanne and Simon on a journey to Middle East in search of their tangled roots. Adapted from Wajdi Mouawad's acclaimed play, Incendies tells the powerful and moving tale of two young adults' voyage to the core of deep-rooted hatred, never-ending wars and enduring love.

Cast Crew Details Genres Releases

Cast

Lubna Azabal Mélissa Désormeaux-Poulin Maxim Gaudette Rémy Girard Allen Altman Abdelghafour Elaaziz Dominique Briand Frédéric Paquet Ahmad Massad John Dunn-Hill Jackie Sawiris Lara Atalla Baya Belal Yousef Shweihat Karim Babin Mohamed Majd Mustafa Kamel Hussein Sami Hamed Najem Bader Alami Majida Hussein Asriah Nijres Nadia Essadiqi Baraka Rahmani Nabil Koni

Alternative Titles

Incêndios, Pogorzelisko, Felperzselt föld, La donna che canta, 烈火焚身, 母亲的告白, 焦头烂额, 烈火焚城, 中东的希腊悲剧, Изпепелени, Pozáry, Nawals hemmelighed, Nawals hemmelighet - Incendies, Incendies - Nawals Hemmelighet, 그을린 사랑, 灼熱の魂（La donna che canta）, Die Frau, die singt, Incendios, İçimdeki Yangın, Die Frau die singt - Incendies, Incendies - A Mulher que Canta, 焦土之城, Пожары, Nawals hemlighet, Згаришта, Μέσα από τις φλόγες, האישה ששרה, Пожежі, Požáry, Nawalin salaisuus, ویران‌شده, Ženska, ki poje, Incendii, 灼熱の魂, Bí Mật Người Mẹ, حرائق, 母親的告白, ย้อนรอยอดีตไม่มีวันลืม, Požiare, Incendis, Naša majka

Popular reviews

More
Review by Hungkat 61

Contains what I think is the single most terrifying gasp ever and it’s arguably scarier than most horror movies I’ve seen combined.

Translated from by
Review by LetMeExplain 29

There’s before you watch Incendies and then there’s after.

Translated from by
Review by demi adejuyigbe 52

why is radiohead’s “you and whose army” in this movie twice. why is “like spinning plates” also in this movie. why are those the only songs on the soundtrack. why did villeneuve make a perfect film and then hire me in my freshman year of college as the music supervisor. and what on earth did i do with that money...

Translated from by
Review by cinéfila... 🕯️ 13

this makes prisoners look like a feel good rom-com.

Translated from by
Review by Fabiro 7

This review may contain spoilers. I can handle the truth.

“One plus one equals one”

What a great and terrifying quote...

Translated from by
Review by Lucy 11

this ended like 45 minutes ago and i'm still sitting here trying to recover

Translated from by
Review by Lucy 9

This review may contain spoilers. I can handle the truth.

rewatching this was like eating glass. this is denis villeneuve's masterpiece. the plot twist alone is one of the most alarming things i've ever seen on film

Translated from by
Review by elvisthealien 18

This is one of those movies that forces you to sit in silence for an hour after watching it.

Translated from by
Review by liam f 61

you ever watch a film and get annoyed at yourself for figuring out the plot twist too early

Translated from by
Review by p e r s i a 🍒 1

me starting the movie: haha hell yeah 😍 incoming denis villeneuve banger! 🥳 radiohead? 👀 hell fucking yeah 👌🏻😤 about to be a serve 👁👄👁 can’t wait for the cute sibling reunion 😩

me finishing the movie: fuck you denis villeneuve

Translated from by

Incendies 🤝 Oldboy

Most fucked up plot twist to watch with your mom and sister on movie night.

Letterboxd is an independent service created by a small team, and we rely mostly on the support of our members to maintain our site and apps. Please consider upgrading to a Pro account—for less than a couple bucks a month, you’ll get cool additional features like all-time and annual stats pages (example), the ability to select (and filter by) your favorite streaming services, and no ads!
